examples: Children often copy their parents or older siblings

meanings.definition: create a representation or model of
examples: The pilots are trained in conditions simulating high-altitude flights
She assumed indifference, even though she was seething with anger

meanings.definition: not genuine or real; being an imitation of the genuine article
examples: it isn't fake anything; it's real synthetic fur
a purse of simulated alligator hide

meanings.definition: reproduced or made to resemble; imitative in character
